narrative:
Jackson County has 19,812 registered voters, with 55.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 33.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 23.8 percentage points. Baby Boomers are the largest generational cohort at 28.9% of registrants.
